---
title: "\'Manners and Morals\'. By Miss Yonge"
---

## \'Manners and Morals\'. By Miss Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1884
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Girls\' Friendly Society Associates\' Journal and Advertiser</i> (March 1884) 34-35

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
